added.name: Automated Payment Set-up (Incl. ACH Authorization and Capture process)

Marketing Materials - Includes: Dealer/Contractor/Retailer Materials, Paid Content or API Partner Materials , Digital (including website), Apple App Store Page, Google Play Store Page, Digital (Landing Page), Social Media, Email, Print, Direct Mail, Press Release, TV/Radio/Other, All Website Screenshots (FAQ's, Contact, About Us, etc.)
System Access - QA level access for bank team
Enhanced Goverance Program - ex: More frequent site vists, weekly meetings, etc.

Borrower Agreements - Includes: Cardholder Agreement (if open-end), Terms and Conditions, Business Loan Agreement (if SMB), Consumer Loan Agreement, Promissory Note, Truth In Lending Disclosure (TIL), Loan Agreement (if closed-end)

Account Servicing Policy/Procedures - Includes: Account Servicing Policy/Procedures , Account Closing Procedure, Servicing Portal Screen Shots, Servicing Call Scripts (talking points), Fraud Procedures (Servicing), Fraud Communications, Escheatment

Decisions & Reasons - Includes: Decision Communication , AA Methodology , AA Reasons, Adverse Action Communications - Bureau, Adverse Action Communications - Non Bureau, Adverse Action Communications - Manual Delivery Process, ECOA/Adverse Action Reporting, Approval Communication
